name: Colacurcio Organization
description: The Colacurcio Organization was a criminal group based in Seattle, Washington, founded in the 1950s by Frank Colacurcio. It operated strip clubs and vending machines as fronts for racketeering, prostitution, and money laundering. The organization was dismantled after a series of indictments in 2009-2010, culminating in Colacurcio Sr.'s death in 2010 and his son's conviction.
